title: viburnum atrocyaneum subsp. harryanum
intro: Viburnum atrocyaneum subsp. harryanum is a lesser-known subspecies of the Viburnum atrocyaneum plant, a type of flowering shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viburnum atrocyaneum subsp. harryanum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and treating wounds due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
